title: Drawpile Servers
description: A description for the capabilities of a set of Drawpile servers. Should be served from `/.well-known/drawpile/servers.json`.

$id.description: URL to this file, must be under /.well-known/drawpile/servers.json, optionally with query parameters afterwards.

version.description: Version number of this file, 1.0.0 for this schema.

title.description: A name for this set of servers.

description.description: A description for this set of servers. Will be interpreted in Qt's HTML subset. Should contain a link to rules.

drawpile.description: Drawpile servers in this set of servers. All hosts must be under the same parent domain.

items.description: A Drawpile server in this set.

title.description: A name for this Drawpile server.

host.description: Hostname or IP address of this server.

port.description: TCP port of the server, defaults to 27750 if missing.

ext_auth_url.description: External authentication used by this server, only informational

allowed_list_servers.description: Allow list of list server URLs. If missing, all servers are allowed.

join_policy.description: Who can join sessions. This is an array for forward-compatibility, the client will use the first value it understands.

items.description: any: anyone can join; account_required: internal or external account required to join; permission_required: account with special permissions required to join

host_policy.description: Who can host sessions. This is an array for forward-compatibility, the client will use the first value it understands.

items.description: any: anyone can host; account_required: internal or external account required to host; permission_required: account with special permissions required to host; none: nobody can host

persistence_policy.description: Who can make sessions persistent. This is an array for forward-compatibility, the client will use the first value it understands.

items.description: any: anyone can make sessions persistent; account_required: internal or external account required to make sessions persistent; permission_required: account with special permissions required to make sessions persistent; none: nobody can make sessions persistent

nsfm_policy.description: How this server handles sessions that are not suitable for minors (NSFM). This is an array for forward-compatibility, the client will use the first value it understands.

items.description: allowed: allowed if those sessions are marked NSFM; only: this server only allows NSFM sessions and they will automatically be marked as such; forbidden: no NSFM sessions allowed on this server

browser_policy.description: How this server handles joining via browser. This is an array for forward-compatibility, the client will use the first value it understands.

items.description: any: all sessions can be joined via browser; only_passworded: only sessions with a password can be joined via browser; account_required: need internal or external account to join via browser; permission_required: need an account with special permissions to join via browser; none: joining via browser is not available

listing.description: Listing servers in this set of servers.

items.description: A list server in his set.

title.description: A name for this listing server.

url.description: Listings URL, where the client can fetch sessions.
